# ai-credit-scrub

> A free local CLI for developers who want to remove automatic AI-agent credit
> text before Git commits, pushes, and GitHub pull request creation.

ai-credit-scrub is an offline-first Go command-line tool. Its local Git hooks
rewrite the temporary commit message before Git creates the commit and block an
escaped explicit credit before push. It does not alter Git authors, committers,
or source code.

## Primary resources

- [Repository](https://github.com/paladini/ai-credit-scrub)
- [Releases](https://github.com/paladini/ai-credit-scrub/releases)
- [Local enforcement guide](https://github.com/paladini/ai-credit-scrub/blob/main/docs/local-enforcement.md)
- [Agent integration guide](https://github.com/paladini/ai-credit-scrub/blob/main/docs/integrations.md)

## Installation

```sh
go install github.com/paladini/ai-credit-scrub/cmd/ai-credit-scrub@latest
ai-credit-scrub install --git
```
